title: Pets & Dungeons
description: Adds magical pets, magical weapons and new structures
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want!


Introduction


This mod adds several different magical creatures that help you in combat and also give you different buffs. All the structures spawn in the overworld and can be located with the /locate command. Staris are found through crafting with a new ore you can find underground. Oorbies are found in structures that you can find buried inside dirt. The special weapons and items can be found as loot inside loot chests.

 

You can heal your Oorbies and Staris by feeding them food (modded food works too!). The amount of health they recover is the same as the amount of hunger the food item restores. For example, cookies heal 2HP, steaks heal 8HP, chorus fruits heal 4HP, and so on.

 

This mod is for Forge and there will never be a Fabric port.

 

List of mobs & information about them


There are a lot of mobs in this mod, so if you want to know about them, you'll have to read this Google Doc. Click here to get to a guide of all the new mobs added by the mod.

 

List of items you receive from Stari feeder blocks

100% coal
50% magma block
30% gravel
20% gunpowder
10% flint
10% fire charge
10% leather

30% nautilus shell

20% tropical fish

10% sea pickle

10% wheat

10% rabbit hide
5% rabbit's foot

 

Status effects added by the mod

Shadow Twitch: Makes the user move around frenetically.

Hunger Immunity: Makes the user immune to the Hunger effect.

Spiky: Has the same effect as the Thorns enchantment, but it’s a status effect instead.

Innocence Dropper: This effect is exclusively obtained when taming an Innocence Oorbie. Makes the owner of the Innocence Oorbie have a 40% chance of getting a Sliver of Innocence dropped whenever they kill an entity. The timer goes down but gets automatically reset if the Innocence Oorbie is near its owner.

Marine Hate: Makes the user get hurt when touching water or when it's raining and there's no roof above them.

Zap: Makes the user hurt when touching water. If anyone gets near someone that has Zap, they will get Marine Hate for a duration of 25 seconds.

Explosive Eyes: This effect is exclusively given by the Floating Eyes you summon with the Eyes Scepter. This effect makes the enemy blow up 4 seconds after the effect is obtained.

Nyctophobia: Makes the user get hurt when it's night time.

Photophobia: Makes the user get hurt when it's day time.

Sticky Surface: Gives the user Slowness III when walking on stone. The Slowness effect lasts for as long as the Sticky Surface effect, plus 3 seconds.


Frosty Rain: Makes the user get Slowness VII when it's raining. Lasts for as long as the duration of Frosty Rain, plus 2 seconds.

Bloodthirst:M akes the user gain Strength II for 20 seconds when killing an enemy.

 

Items added by the mod

 

Stari Molds

These molds can be mixed with different items to create the different rarities of the Staris you want to get. For example, Stari Mold + Diamond would create a Legendary Stari Mold, which can later be put into a crafting table to create the specific legendary stari you would want. I highly recommend using Just Enough Items to discover the crafting recipes.

 

Light Tools, Glowing Fruit & Glow Trees

Light tools. When used against Shadelings, they will automatically die. Same stats as netherite. The light tools are direct upgrades to diamond tools, just like Netherite is.

Glowing Fruit & Glow Trees. It is a rare fruit found in special trees throughout the world. The fruit is obtained from breaking the leaves of the Glow Tree. Glow Wood gives off a light level of 6. When eating a Glowing Fruit, you receive Glowing for 10 seconds. It restores 9 hunger - 1.0 saturation. Glowing Fruits can be farmed by right-clicking Glow Leaves with Honeycomb.

  

Sun & Moon Staff

During the day, has a 40% chance of setting enemies on fire for 9 seconds. During the night, has a 40% chance of giving Slowness V for 7 seconds to enemies.

 

Crevasse Hammer

Has built-in knockback and also gives Slowness III for 3 seconds to the enemies it hits

 

Jaws Caller

Has a 50% chance of spawning Evoker fangs below the enemies you hit with it. Also, when right-clicked, you spawn a wave of Evoker Fangs around you. Doing this will cost 2 uses of the weapon.

 

Anti-Gravity Scepter 

Gives the target Levitation VI for 3 seconds.

 

Shadow of Transmutation

It's dropped by Shadelings. They are used for crafting weapons, Dragon Breath and some other special items.

 

Dark Star

It's dropped with a 10% chance by Shadelings. They are used for crafting weapons, Dragon breath, some other special items and also for brewing potions of Hunger Immunity.

 

Sun-Shaped Marshmallow, Moon-Shaped Marshmallow & Twinklefruit

These food items give the player that eats them Health Boost depending on the time of the day it is. The Sun-Shaped Marshmallow gives Health Boost during daytime. The Moon-Shaped Marshmallow gives Health Boost during night time. The Twinklefruit gives Health Boost any time of the day.

 

Waking Hope

It's a very special item you have to craft yourself. It's used for summoning Ragclow.

 

Eyes Scepter 

When right-clicking on a block, it spawns a floating eye that will track down enemies and give them the effect ''Explosive Eyes'', which makes the enemy blow up 4 seconds after the effect is obtained. Dropped by Ragclow.

 

Doomsday Block

When right-clicked with a Waking Hope, Ragclow will appear. You can find this block in its own structure (/locate pets_dun:ragclow_structure)
